criteria.name: Innovation & Creativity
criteria.description: Originality, uniqueness, and creative thinking behind the idea.

criteria.name: Problem Understanding & Relevance
criteria.description: Clarity of problem definition and alignment to the ideathon theme.

criteria.name: Feasibility & Practicality
criteria.description: Realistic implementation plan within available resources and timeframe.

criteria.name: Impact & Usefulness
criteria.description: Social, environmental, or economic impact potential of the solution.

criteria.name: User-Centric Approach
criteria.description: Focus on user needs, accessibility, and inclusivity of the solution.

criteria.name: Scalability & Future Scope
criteria.description: Ability to expand, sustain, and evolve the solution over time.

criteria.name: Sustainability & Ethics
criteria.description: Eco-friendly practices and ethical considerations in the solution design.

criteria.name: Presentation & Communication
criteria.description: Pitch clarity, structure, visual design, and confidence of delivery.

criteria.name: Teamwork & Collaboration
criteria.description: Coordination, participation, and team dynamics demonstrated.

criteria.name: Business Viability
criteria.description: Market potential, affordability, and real-world applicability of the idea.
